message: Uploading a PDF doesn't always work. Sometimes it succeeds, but most of the time the application suddenly disappears.
Working late is difficult because the interface is too bright. A darker appearance would really help.
I forgot my password and I'm not sure how to regain access to my account.
Since the last update I can type my username and password, but nothing happens after clicking Sign In.
Many users in our company don't speak English. Supporting multiple languages would be valuable.
Could you clarify why I was charged twice this month?
Yesterday's update completed successfully, but now almost every page becomes unresponsive after a few seconds.
For better security, I think logging in with a one-time verification code would be useful.
